Code path scripts/golden_path.py: on check_db fail → _save_final_ledger(status=failed) + return 1. Re-run exit != 0. slice-result.claim_success=false; honored_no_success_on_failure=true. MANIFEST does not claim operational green.

No full-green claim in MANIFEST/slice-result; no PRE_VPS_FINAL_READY/LOCAL_RESILIENCE_READY seal flip; commit 7231be7 does not touch DOD.md. Residual: 01-run.exit has GOLDEN_EXIT=0 while 01 log shows DB fail (capture inconsistency) — superseded by 02-run.exit=1 and independent re-run exit=1.
git show 7231be7 touches only story/state/session pack — no DOD.md

acceptance_criteria.text: Reproducible golden path result (pass or honest degraded health)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Session pack + independent re-run exit 1 + ledger status=failed when PG unavailable (honest degraded / fail-closed)

acceptance_criteria.text: No success claim on timeout/DB fail
acceptance_criteria.evidence: exit!=0; claim_success=false; code returns 1 on DB fail; MANIFEST non-claims explicit

residual_concerns.description: Session artifact 01-run.exit records GOLDEN_EXIT=0 while 01-run-skip-reports.log shows PostgreSQL NAO respondeu / ledger-slice status failed — exit capture bug for first attempt only. Canonical 02-run.exit=1 and QA re-run exit=1 override.
residual_concerns.recommendation: Prefer single canonical exit file; capture via `echo GOLDEN_EXIT=$?` immediately after python process in same shell without intervening commands that reset $?

residual_concerns.description: Commit 7231be7 is evidence-only (no scripts/golden_path.py delta); fail-closed behavior was already present. Story AC is satisfied by reproducible honest degraded signal, not by new code change.
residual_concerns.recommendation: If live PNCP health still required for DoD gate, schedule follow-up with make db-up + network; do not rebrand this slice as live green

residual_concerns.description: Live crawl / source health for PNCP not proven (PG down, external_dependency). Slice correctly records health signal as fail-closed, not operational green.
residual_concerns.recommendation: Keep candidate/DoD from claiming PRE_VPS or full golden path until live canary with PG succeeds
